---
title: "Figure 3"
subtitle: "Posterior estimates of fixed effects from the global meta‐analysis models for species richness (left) and total abundance (right).  "
author: "Dillan Hoyt"
execute: 
  eval: true
  echo: false
  message: false
editor: visual
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
toc-title: Contents
---

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(brms)
library(posterior)
library(tibble)
library(scales)
library(grid)

set.seed(2025)

# Load models 
sr_mod <- readRDS("m_sr_all_randomeffect_andinteraction_new.rds")
ab_mod <- readRDS("m_abundance_interaction_ALL_new.rds")

sr_data <- sr_mod$data
ab_data <- ab_mod$data

```

```{r}

# standardise matrix labels for counting
standardise_matrix_names <- function(df) {
  if (!"Matrix_mean" %in% names(df)) return(df)
  m <- as.character(df$Matrix_mean)
  m <- trimws(m)
  m_lower <- tolower(m)
  
  m[m_lower %in% c("open land", "openland", "open_land", "open-land", "open", "savanna", "savannah")] <- "Savanna"
  m[m_lower %in% c("production forest", "production_forests", "productionforests")] <- "Production forest"
  m[grepl("^secondary", m_lower)] <- "Secondary forest"
  m[grepl("water", m_lower)] <- "Water"
  m[grepl("human", m_lower)] <- "Human Settlements"
  m[grepl("agric", m_lower)] <- "Agriculture"
  
  df$Matrix_mean <- factor(m)
  df
}

sr_data <- standardise_matrix_names(sr_data)
ab_data <- standardise_matrix_names(ab_data)

# Order the variables in the same way for both datasets
term_labels <- c(
  "ComparisonFrag_vs_Cont"        = "F-C (fragment vs continuous)",
  "ComparisonFrag_vs_Frag"        = "F-F (fragment vs fragment)",
  "log_forest_area_ref_s"         = "Reference forest area",
  "Elevation_s"                   = "Elevation (m)",
  "Rainfall_mm_s"                 = "Rainfall (mm)",
  "Latitude_s"                    = "Latitude",
  "Longitude_s"                   = "Longitude",
  "Matrix_meanOpen_land"          = "Matrix: Savanna",
  "Matrix_meanProduction_forests" = "Matrix: Production forest",
  "Matrix_meanSecondaryforest"    = "Matrix: Secondary forest",
  "Matrix_meanWater"              = "Matrix: Water",
  "Forest_GroupTropical_Lowland"  = "Forest: Tropical lowland",
  "Forest_GroupTropical_Montane"  = "Forest: Tropical montane",
  "Forest_GroupTemperate"         = "Forest: Temperate"
)

term_order <- c(
  "ComparisonFrag_vs_Cont",
  "ComparisonFrag_vs_Frag",
  "log_forest_area_ref_s",
  "Elevation_s",
  "Rainfall_mm_s",
  "Latitude_s",
  "Longitude_s",
  "Matrix_meanOpen_land",
  "Matrix_meanProduction_forests",
  "Matrix_meanSecondaryforest",
  "Matrix_meanWater",
  "Forest_GroupTropical_Lowland",
  "Forest_GroupTropical_Montane",
  "Forest_GroupTemperate"
)

# mapping them just to make sure they're correctly ordered and labelled in the figure
term_aliases <- list(
  ComparisonFrag_vs_Cont        = c("ComparisonFrag_vs_Cont"),
  ComparisonFrag_vs_Frag        = c("ComparisonFrag_vs_Frag"),
  log_forest_area_ref_s         = c("log_forest_area_ref_s", "log_area_num_s"),
  Elevation_s                   = c("Elevation_s"),
  Rainfall_mm_s                 = c("Rainfall_mm_s"),
  Latitude_s                    = c("Latitude_s"),
  Longitude_s                   = c("Longitude_s"),
  Matrix_meanOpen_land          = c("Matrix_meanOpen_land", "Matrix_meanOpenland", "Matrix_meanSavanna"),
  Matrix_meanProduction_forests = c("Matrix_meanProduction_forests", "Matrix_meanProductionforests"),
  Matrix_meanSecondaryforest    = c("Matrix_meanSecondaryforest"),
  Matrix_meanWater              = c("Matrix_meanWater"),
  Forest_GroupTropical_Lowland  = c("Forest_GroupTropical_Lowland", "Forest_GroupTropicalLowland"),
  Forest_GroupTropical_Montane  = c("Forest_GroupTropical_Montane", "Forest_GroupTropicalMontane"),
  Forest_GroupTemperate         = c("Forest_GroupTemperate")
)

# Counts for labels
count_term <- function(df, term) {
  if (!("Comparison" %in% names(df))) {
    comp_n <- NA_integer_
  } else {
    comp_n <- NULL
  }
  
  switch(
    term,
    ComparisonFrag_vs_Cont = if ("Comparison" %in% names(df)) sum(as.character(df$Comparison) == "Frag_vs_Cont", na.rm = TRUE) else NA_integer_,
    ComparisonFrag_vs_Frag = if ("Comparison" %in% names(df)) sum(as.character(df$Comparison) == "Frag_vs_Frag", na.rm = TRUE) else NA_integer_,
    
    log_forest_area_ref_s  = sum(!is.na(df$log_forest_area_ref_s)),
    Elevation_s            = sum(!is.na(df$Elevation_s)),
    Rainfall_mm_s          = sum(!is.na(df$Rainfall_mm_s)),
    Latitude_s             = sum(!is.na(df$Latitude_s)),
    Longitude_s            = sum(!is.na(df$Longitude_s)),
    
    Matrix_meanOpen_land          = if ("Matrix_mean" %in% names(df)) sum(as.character(df$Matrix_mean) == "Savanna", na.rm = TRUE) else NA_integer_,
    Matrix_meanProduction_forests = if ("Matrix_mean" %in% names(df)) sum(as.character(df$Matrix_mean) == "Production forest", na.rm = TRUE) else NA_integer_,
    Matrix_meanSecondaryforest    = if ("Matrix_mean" %in% names(df)) sum(as.character(df$Matrix_mean) == "Secondary forest", na.rm = TRUE) else NA_integer_,
    Matrix_meanWater              = if ("Matrix_mean" %in% names(df)) sum(as.character(df$Matrix_mean) == "Water", na.rm = TRUE) else NA_integer_,
    
    Forest_GroupTropical_Lowland  = if ("Forest_Group" %in% names(df)) sum(as.character(df$Forest_Group) == "Tropical_Lowland", na.rm = TRUE) else NA_integer_,
    Forest_GroupTropical_Montane  = if ("Forest_Group" %in% names(df)) sum(as.character(df$Forest_Group) == "Tropical_Montane", na.rm = TRUE) else NA_integer_,
    Forest_GroupTemperate         = if ("Forest_Group" %in% names(df)) sum(as.character(df$Forest_Group) == "Temperate", na.rm = TRUE) else NA_integer_,
    
    NA_integer_
  )
}

fmt_n <- function(x) {
  if (is.na(x) || x <= 0) "-" else formatC(x, format = "d", big.mark = ",")
}

make_label <- function(term) {
  sr_n <- count_term(sr_data, term)
  ab_n <- count_term(ab_data, term)
  
  base <- if (term %in% names(term_labels)) term_labels[[term]] else term
  paste0(base, " ", fmt_n(sr_n), " (", fmt_n(ab_n), ")")
}

label_lookup <- setNames(vapply(term_order, make_label, character(1)), term_order)

# Extract fixed effects and create comparison rows

extract_plot_data <- function(mod, response_label, term_order, term_aliases, label_lookup) {
  draws_df <- posterior::as_draws_df(posterior::as_draws_array(mod))
  
  # Fixed-effect draw columns
  b_cols <- grep("^b_", names(draws_df), value = TRUE)
  b_names <- sub("^b_", "", b_cols)
  b_map <- setNames(b_cols, b_names)
  
  # Intercept draws
  if (!("b_Intercept" %in% names(draws_df))) {
    stop("Model is missing b_Intercept draws.")
  }
  intercept_draws <- as.numeric(draws_df[["b_Intercept"]])
  
  out_summary <- list()
  out_draws <- list()
  
  for (term in term_order) {
    aliases <- term_aliases[[term]]
    available_alias <- aliases[aliases %in% names(b_map)]
    
    if (term == "ComparisonFrag_vs_Cont") {
      # Reference comparison level: use intercept
      vals <- intercept_draws
      
    } else if (term == "ComparisonFrag_vs_Frag") {
      # Non-reference comparison level: intercept + coefficient
      if (!("ComparisonFrag_vs_Frag" %in% names(b_map))) next
      vals <- intercept_draws + as.numeric(draws_df[[b_map[["ComparisonFrag_vs_Frag"]]]])
      
    } else {
      # Standard coefficient term
      if (length(available_alias) == 0) next
      vals <- as.numeric(draws_df[[b_map[[available_alias[1]]]]])
    }
    
    out_summary[[term]] <- data.frame(
      term = term,
      Estimate = mean(vals, na.rm = TRUE),
      CI_low = as.numeric(quantile(vals, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE)),
      CI_high = as.numeric(quantile(vals, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE)),
      response = response_label,
      label = label_lookup[[term]],
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    
    n_keep <- min(length(vals), 500)
    idx <- sample(seq_along(vals), size = n_keep, replace = FALSE)
    out_draws[[term]] <- data.frame(
      term = term,
      value = vals[idx],
      response = response_label,
      label = label_lookup[[term]],
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }
  
  list(
    summary = bind_rows(out_summary),
    draws = bind_rows(out_draws)
  )
}

sr_res <- extract_plot_data(sr_mod, "Species richness", term_order, term_aliases, label_lookup)
ab_res <- extract_plot_data(ab_mod, "Total abundance", term_order, term_aliases, label_lookup)

summaries <- bind_rows(sr_res$summary, ab_res$summary)
draws_all <- bind_rows(sr_res$draws, ab_res$draws)

# Clean order terms 
keep_terms <- term_order

summaries <- summaries %>%
  filter(term %in% keep_terms) %>%
  mutate(
    label = label_lookup[term],
    fill_val = sign(Estimate) * abs(Estimate)^0.35
  )

draws_all <- draws_all %>%
  filter(term %in% keep_terms) %>%
  mutate(
    label = label_lookup[term],
    fill_val = sign(value) * abs(value)^0.35
  )

# Remove terms not wanted in figure
drop_terms <- c("Forest_GroupEucalyptus", "Matrix_meanHuman_settlements")
summaries <- summaries %>% filter(!term %in% drop_terms)
draws_all  <- draws_all %>% filter(!term %in% drop_terms)

# Keep only labels still present
label_levels <- label_lookup[keep_terms[keep_terms %in% summaries$term]]
label_levels <- label_levels[!is.na(label_levels)]
label_levels <- rev(unique(label_levels))

summaries$label <- factor(summaries$label, levels = label_levels)
draws_all$label  <- factor(draws_all$label, levels = label_levels)

# Background stripes
row_df_plot <- data.frame(
  label = levels(summaries$label),
  y = seq_along(levels(summaries$label)),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Plot
cb_ramp <- c(
  "#440154FF", "#46337EFF", "#365C8DFF", "#277F8EFF",
  "#1FA187FF", "#4AC16DFF", "#9FDA3AFF", "#FDE725FF"
)

fill_limits <- range(c(summaries$fill_val, draws_all$fill_val), na.rm = TRUE)

p_final <- ggplot() +
  geom_rect(
    data = row_df_plot[row_df_plot$y %% 2 == 0, ],
    aes(ymin = y - 0.5, ymax = y + 0.5),
    xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
    fill = "grey97", color = NA,
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_rect(
    data = row_df_plot[row_df_plot$y %% 2 == 1, ],
    aes(ymin = y - 0.5, ymax = y + 0.5),
    xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
    fill = "white", color = NA,
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_jitter(
    data = draws_all,
    aes(x = value, y = label, fill = fill_val),
    shape = 21, height = 0.12, width = 0,
    alpha = 0.10, size = 0.6, color = "grey55"
  ) +
  geom_errorbar(
    data = summaries,
    aes(xmin = CI_low, xmax = CI_high, y = label),
    orientation = "y",
    linewidth = 0.9,
    color = "black",
    width = 0.25
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = summaries,
    aes(x = Estimate, y = label, fill = fill_val),
    shape = 21, size = 3.2, color = "black", stroke = 0.35
  ) +
  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colours = cb_ramp,
    limits = fill_limits,
    oob = scales::squish,
    values = scales::rescale(c(fill_limits[1], 0, fill_limits[2])),
    guide = guide_colorbar(
      title = "Effect size",
      barwidth = unit(8, "cm"),
      barheight = unit(0.4, "cm")
    )
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ response, ncol = 2, scales = "free_x") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  labs(x = "Effect size (lnRR)", y = NULL, fill = "") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray92", linewidth = 0.25),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    strip.placement = "outside",
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 20, r = 8, b = 8, l = 8),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

print(p_final)

ggsave(
  "Fig_SRandAbunLandcape_fina_NEW.tiff",
  plot = p_final,
  width = 178,
  height = 200,
  units = "mm",
  dpi = 600,
  compression = "lzw",
  bg = "white"
)
```
